form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 1.5 len at Sirinyer All Weather March 13 over 1400m defeating Hard And Fast carrying 61kg at $1.85. The run before that 3rd in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather in G3 on February 22 over 1400m, 8 len behind Wardenclyffe with 58kg at $6.70. Ideally placed to make it two on the trot.

form.formComment: At the latest run 3rd of 10 at this track on March 21 over 1300m, 1.4 len behind Ammayaman carrying 55kg at $1.70. The start before that 6th of 8 at this track in G3 on March 14 over 1500m, 5 len behind Magic Weapon with 56.5kg at $4.70. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months won by a 0.3 len at this track G3 March 14 over 1500m defeating Al Tan with 52kg at $11.50. Previously second-up 4th of 14 at Veliefendi on April 20 over 1900m, 1.5 len behind Purosangue with 59kg at $6.05. This is tougher so prefer others.
